steps.title: Use the flying-bird example
steps.content: The text says most flying birds weigh less than 1 kg, then asks for an example showing that not all flying birds are so light. The right example must therefore be both capable of flight and much heavier than 1 kg.

steps.title: Check flight and mass
steps.content: Choice B misstates the Andean condor's mass as below 10 kg. Choices C and D use the Somali ostrich, which is flightless, so neither can support a claim about flying birds. The remaining choice gives a flying bird with a mass far above 1 kg. The answer is A.
